title: DfE Update: 8 October 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Action Your final funding claim for 2024 to 2025   Action Record your T Level data accurately   Information Updated requirements and guidance for the financial health assessment of organisations   Reminder Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund digital form     Latest for academies     Article Title     Action Your final funding claim for 2024 to 2025   Action Record your T Level data accurately   Information PE and sport premium guidance and conditions of grant for academic year 2025 to 2026   Reminder Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund digital form   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement (DfE’s alternative to commercial insurance)   Events and webinars Senior Leadership & Operations Power Hour: Sustainability support programme   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return     Latest for local authorities     Article Title     Action Your final funding claim for 2024 to 2025   Action Record your T Level data accurately   Information PE and sport premium guidance and conditions of grant for academic year 2025 to 2026   Reminder Care to Learn and 16 to 19 Bursary Fund digital form   Events and webinars Risk protection arrangement (DfE’s alternative to commercial insurance)   Events and webinars Senior Leadership & Operations Power Hour: Sustainability support programme    "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
School and academy financial management and assurance
